title: 50PCS Black Disposable Face Masks – 3-Ply Breathable & Comfortable Masks with Elastic Ear Loops – Daily Nose & Mouth Protection
features: 𝗟𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘄𝗲𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 & 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗳𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗳𝗶𝘁 : These 3-ply disposable face masks are made from soft, breathable non-woven fabric. Designed for long wear, with a flexible nose wire for a secure, snug fit and better face coverage.

𝗕𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗵𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝟯-𝗣𝗹𝘆 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝘁𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 : Made with high-quality non-woven fabric and a melt-blown filter layer, offering reliable protection. Gentle on skin, non-toxic, and non-irritating for everyday face mask use.

𝗨𝗻𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗮𝗹 𝗦𝗶𝘇𝗲 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗔𝗱𝘂𝗹𝘁𝘀 : One size fits most men and women. Face mask dimensions: 175 x 95 mm. Features strong elastic ear loops for a secure, comfortable hold—great for everyday wear, work, and errands.
𝗠𝘂𝗹𝘁𝗶-𝗣𝘂𝗿𝗽𝗼𝘀𝗲 𝗗𝗮𝗶𝗹𝘆 𝗨𝘀𝗲 𝗠𝗮𝘀𝗸 : Ideal for travel, shopping, commuting, walking, cycling, running, gym, and outdoor activities. Designed to help protect against dust, droplets, and general pollution.

𝗦𝗶𝗻𝗴𝗹𝗲 𝗨𝘀𝗲 & 𝗟𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘅-𝗙𝗿𝗲𝗲 : These disposable face masks are intended for one-time use. Latex-free and safe for sensitive skin. Discard after use by removing via the ear loops and placing in a closed bin.
description: Product Description Disposable Face Masks – Available in Multiple Pack Sizes – 3-Ply Protection with Comfortable Fit Our high-quality disposable face masks are designed for a better wearing experience. The 3-layer construction offers enhanced protection, while the ultra-elastic ear loops reduce pressure on the face and ears for all-day comfort. An embedded adjustable nose clip ensures a secure fit, adapting to the shape of your nose and face for improved coverage. Available in various pack sizes to suit your needs. A face mask is made from high-quality materials and advanced manufacturing techniques to ensure a superior product. Double non-woven fabric and a melt-blown layer provide enhanced protection. Soft and comfortable material ensures the disposable mask is gentle on the skin with no irritation. The 3D breathing space design allows easy, comfortable breathing throughout the day. Suitable for Various Uses Our disposable face masks are designed for versatile use, making them ideal for daily wear, post-surgical recovery, cleaning tasks, service industry professionals, and general protection. Made from breathable, non-woven fabric with elastic ear loops, they provide comfort and reliable coverage for various settings.
